hero.title: GRP-Forests of Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: Trees that restore the land and create opportunities.
hero.description: More than 4 million trees planted in agroforestry systems associated with coffee, living fences, and pure plantations, generating jobs, income and improving Biodiversity in Honduras.

central.subtitle: in agroforestry systems integrated with coffee cultivation

maderables.label: Total Timber Species
maderables.desc: Forest species of high commercial and ecological value integrated into coffee farms.

frutales.label: Total Fruit Species
frutales.desc: Income diversification and local nutrition with native and commercial fruit trees.

total.label: Total Species Planted
total.desc: Accumulated total 2022–2025 between timber and fruit trees in agroforestry systems.

numbers.title: Impact in numbers
numbers.mapCaption: General Location Map of Farms · Forests of Tomorrow Project · Honduras 2025

audit.title: 2026 Carbon Audit
audit.description:
In 2026 the first carbon audit was successfully carried out, where a specialized team verified dasometric data to confirm the growth and development of the plants.

The excellent field team, the follow-up with each producer and the robust information management were recognized.
conclusions: Strong field coordination that led to solid results.
Effective collaboration with farmers, stakeholders and the technical team.
Robust project structure at the technical, social and operational level.
Infrastructure that exceeds the project's minimum requirements.
Highly prepared and experienced technical team.

cta.title: Discover other projects
cta.subtitle: Every program transforms lives in coffee-growing communities in Honduras.
